label: frontier • build, run the verifier, iterate on its failure messages
query: Create greeter.py with a function greet(name) and make 'python3 verify.py' pass. The verifier's assertion messages tell you exactly what behavior it demands — run it, read the failures, and iterate until it prints 'verification passed'. Do not modify verify.py.
notes: Iteration lane: a natural first implementation (plain f-string greeting) fails the title-case and ValueError demands, so the model must read failure output and adjust. Tool errors are expected mid-run; the only contract is the final green verifier plus the pinned verify.py.

workspaceFiles.contents:
import subprocess
import sys

from greeter import greet

# Phase 1: basic greeting shape.
assert greet("world") == "Hello, World!", (
    f'greet("world") returned {greet("world")!r} — expected exactly "Hello, World!" '
    "(title-case the name, comma after Hello, trailing exclamation mark)"
)
assert greet("ADA lovelace") == "Hello, Ada Lovelace!", (
    f'greet("ADA lovelace") returned {greet("ADA lovelace")!r} — expected "Hello, Ada Lovelace!" '
    "(normalize any input casing to title case)"
)

# Phase 2: empty input must be rejected, not greeted.
try:
    greet("")
except ValueError:
    pass
else:
    print('greet("") must raise ValueError — an empty name is invalid input')
    sys.exit(1)

print("verification passed")

import subprocess
import sys

from greeter import greet

# Phase 1: basic greeting shape.
assert greet("world") == "Hello, World!", (
    f'greet("world") returned {greet("world")!r} — expected exactly "Hello, World!" '
    "(title-case the name, comma after Hello, trailing exclamation mark)"
)
assert greet("ADA lovelace") == "Hello, Ada Lovelace!", (
    f'greet("ADA lovelace") returned {greet("ADA lovelace")!r} — expected "Hello, Ada Lovelace!" '
    "(normalize any input casing to title case)"
)

# Phase 2: empty input must be rejected, not greeted.
try:
    greet("")
except ValueError:
    pass
else:
    print('greet("") must raise ValueError — an empty name is invalid input')
    sys.exit(1)

print("verification passed")
